message: New email from TLDR: TikTok deal done 📱, Android PC 💻, you're not late 👋

metadata.subject: TikTok deal done 📱, Android PC 💻, you're not late 👋
metadata.preview: President Donald Trump is expected to sign a deal today to facilitate the sale of TikTok from ByteDance to a group of American investors ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
